objectives: Implement emit module for mx20022-codegen (XSD IR -> Rust source)
All generated code must be valid Rust (syn::parse_file check)
Pass cargo check/clippy/test for entire workspace
constraints: Rust keywords must be handled with Ident::new_raw (r# prefix)
important_facts: prettyplease = '0.2' added to workspace and codegen Cargo.toml
TypeRef::Builtin(Decimal | Date | DateTime) all map to String (not rust_decimal)
serde rename_all is NOT used; per-field #[serde(rename = 'XmlName')] always emitted
Opaque types use #[serde(rename = '$value')] for xs:any content
ValueWithAttr uses '$value' for text content and '@AttrName' for attributes
head.001.001.04 does not have ValueWithAttr types (no simpleContent with attributes); only Opaque (SignatureEnvelope) uses $value
decisions_made: Use proc_macro2 + quote for token generation, prettyplease for formatting: avoids string manipulation, guarantees valid Rust
util::make_ident uses Ident::new_raw for keywords, Ident::new otherwise: handles 'type', 'ref', etc.
BoundedVec emits Vec<T> with doc comment noting upper bound: simpler than a custom type
Optional attributes in ValueWithAttr become Option<T> with skip_serializing_if: matches serde conventions
CLI uses hand-rolled arg parsing (not clap): keeps the binary footprint small for a dev tool
risks_issues: ValueWithAttr test in snapshot uses head schema which has no simpleContent+attributes: fixed by testing only $value presence (SignatureEnvelope is Opaque, not ValueWithAttr)

iteration.summary: Implemented the complete code emission module for mx20022-codegen. Created 7 emit submodules (mod, util, structs, enums, newtypes, code_enums, value_with_attr, opaque) using proc_macro2 + quote for token generation and prettyplease for formatting. Added prettyplease to workspace and codegen Cargo.toml. Updated main.rs with a real CLI (XSD_FILE + --output flag). Wrote 106 total tests: unit tests in each submodule, integration tests, and insta snapshot tests against head.001.001.04. All pass. Full workspace cargo check, clippy (-D warnings), and test pass cleanly.
outputs_produced: emit module: 7 source files + util module
next_actions: Items 40-54: Generate model types using codegen into mx20022-model/src/generated/
Consider: ValueWithAttr E2E test needs a schema with simpleContent (pacs schemas have ActiveCurrencyAndAmount)
